isi.lyrics:
Lyric Noridogam - Echo

Romanization

A sudden wind came drifting in
Its gentle thoughts clings to all my senses

Endless waves of empty mind
Soft breezes gently echo thoughts in me
Always feeling, feels like being alone
Trapped within endless doubt again

Once the pain has been crushed away
Savage doubts begin to fade out

Could this be a taste of freedom?
Just a blue sky makes me feel alive

Sorrow always finds its way
We already know it will return

Always feeling, feels like being alone
Trapped within endless doubt again

Once the pain has been crushed away
Savage doubts begin to fade out


Hangeul

A sudden wind came drifting in
Its gentle thoughts clings to all my senses

Endless waves of empty mind
Soft breezes gently echo thoughts in me
Always feeling, feels like being alone
Trapped within endless doubt again

Once the pain has been crushed away
Savage doubts begin to fade out

Could this be a taste of freedom?
Just a blue sky makes me feel alive

Sorrow always finds its way
We already know it will return

Always feeling, feels like being alone
Trapped within endless doubt again

Once the pain has been crushed away
Savage doubts begin to fade out
isi.lyrics_timestamp:
A sudden wind came drifting in
Its gentle thoughts clings to all my senses  

Endless waves of empty mind
Soft breezes gently echo thoughts in me
Always feeling, feels like being alone
Trapped within endless doubt again

Once the pain has been crushed away
Savage doubts begin to fade out

Could this be a taste of freedom?        
Just a blue sky makes me feel alive

Sorrow always finds its way
We already know it will return

Always feeling, feels like being alone
Trapped within endless doubt again

Once the pain has been crushed away
Savage doubts begin to fade out

isi.lyrics:
Lyric Noridogam - iwassolo

Romanization

nollaji aneul suga eopseotji neoui misoe
josimseure geonnen hammadie soneul japgoseo
cham isanghae
geuttaen bummyeonghi
yeongwonhal georago
mitgo sipeotji
neol manna cheoeum ilgeun chaekdo seorabe nama itgo
sujupge jeogeo geonnen pyeonjido naegen sojunghae
moreugesseo
urin eojjaeseo
mannal su eomneunji
ijeo beorija
majimak insareul hal ttaega tteoollasseo
geuttaen ihaehal su eopseotjiman marya
sasil,
ajikdo,

molla


Hangeul

놀라지 않을 수가 없었지 너의 미소에
조심스레 건넨 한마디에 손을 잡고서
참 이상해
그땐 분명히
영원할 거라고
믿고 싶었지
널 만나 처음 읽은 책도 서랍에 남아 있고
수줍게 적어 건넨 편지도 내겐 소중해
모르겠어
우린 어째서
만날 수 없는지
잊어 버리자
마지막 인사를 할 때가 떠올랐어
그땐 이해할 수 없었지만 말야
사실,
아직도,

몰라

isi.lyrics:
Lyric Noridogam - DIY

Romanization

Do, Do it yourself
The things to do, I couldn’t catch them all
And I believe
That wasn’t your best call
Even the world already knows
So, Trust yourself
Think what you want
Then speak to the one you faced
Then speak to the one you faced
And smack that face right ahead


Hangeul

Do, Do it yourself
The things to do, I couldn’t catch them all
And I believe
That wasn’t your best call
Even the world already knows
So, Trust yourself
Think what you want
Then speak to the one you faced
Then speak to the one you faced
And smack that face right ahead

isi.lyrics:
Lyric Noridogam - Hazard Course (feat. mei ehara)

Romanization

Nothing sways my mind
Even through eternity

So far, so far

Nothing can fill my heart
Oh, really nothing

Only this rough course waits for me
Just like you

Searching for what might help
Strolling blindfolded

Again and again

I couldn't tell an easy thing
Oh, really nothing

You had every right to sigh
But, I wasn't lying

Picture
No expression

Through the infinite snares

A broken leg, a bruised knee
Such a little hard course.

I think that was the best for me.
Would it feel right if you and I were together?

Oh, it wasn’t meant to be that way.
I know

Picture
No expression

Through the infinite snares

Unmelted
Glacial vale

Still, there's nothing left but to run

There was something inside
The Obstacles I passed by

Well, I could move on

Would it feel right if you and I were together?

Is a steady step the best?

Just like…


Hangeul

Even through eternity

So far, so far

Nothing can fill my heart

Only this rough course waits for me
Just like you

You had every right to sigh

Oh, it wasn’t meant to be that way.
I know

Still, there's nothing left but to run

Just like…

isi.lyrics:
Lyric Noridogam - Truthbuster

Romanization

I sitting on a floor
For listen to your stories

Only speculation
With underrated my solution

Now, time to move your lips

Lie,
Your life is such a tragic
I mean, stop talking and do your job

Like a magic
And there’s no more exceptions
Try not to be a kind of hypocrite

Or you should call your lawyer and
It’s time for self-defence

But you’re gonna fail
No second chance
Just forget about

Time’s up
Now, listen to my story

Maybe you don’t wanna know
But it’s time to shut your mouth

And, it’s time to hear the truth

There’s no escape

isi.lyrics:
Lyric Noridogam - Today, Today

Romanization

I thought I understood
So many times, I saw your eyes

I should have stayed away
Once I thought, was there something more to say?

You don’t need to raise your voice
Don’t even talk
Don’t smile like nothing’s wrong
How long
How long
How long
How long
How long
How long
What did you just say?
Today
There’s nothing left to hold onto
Not even a goodbye
and Today
There won’t be a first for us
and There is no need for a last

We made a promise, didn’t we?
In the name of something called love

With every word, just one by one
We thought we’d slowly start to close

You don’t need to raise your voice
Don’t even talk
Don’t smile like nothing’s wrong
Too late
Too late
Too late
Too late
Too late
Too late
What did you just say?
Today
There’s nothing left to hold onto
Not even a goodbye

and Today
There won’t be a first for us
and There is no need for a last

isi.albums: 추억이 나를 부르면 (When Memories Find Me)
isi.lyrics:
Lyric Havy - 추억이 나를 부르면 (When Memories Find Me)

Romanization

chueogi nareul bureumyeon
sori eomneun ureumi teojyeo nawa

geudaega tteonabeorin geunal ihuro naneun
teong bieobeorin harureul sara

buseojyeo beorin gaseumeun
geudael ijeuraedo
dojeohi jiwojijiga anaseo

nan ajik geudaereul wommanghajyo
geutorok jeolsilhaetdeon nareul tteonan saram

gyejeoreul dolgo dora
saranghan modeun nal
geu modeun ge da sangcheoro nama beoryeotjyo

majimak geudae moseubi
yeojeonhi neul kkumsogeul hemaeijyo

nummulman namainneun naui harue geudae
hambeonirado chajawa jugil

geujeo meon balchiseorado
geu moseubirado
hambeomman barabol suneun eomnayo

nan ajik geudaereul wommanghajyo
geutorok jeolsilhaetdeon nareul tteonan saram

gyejeoreul dolgo dora
saranghan modeun nal
geu modeun ge da sangcheoro nama beoryeotjyo

eonjenggan dasi mannandamyeon
geuttaeneun
heeojijineun marayo geudae

nareul tteonabeorin geudaeyeo
yeojeonhi i jarie naneun gidaryeoyo

sumaneul naui bameun
geudaewaui sarang
chueokhamyeo saragal tenikka
itji mayo

Hangeul

추억이 나를 부르면
소리 없는 울음이 터져 나와

그대가 떠나버린 그날 이후로 나는
텅 비어버린 하루를 살아

부서져 버린 가슴은
그댈 잊으래도
도저히 지워지지가 않아서

난 아직 그대를 원망하죠
그토록 절실했던 나를 떠난 사람

계절을 돌고 돌아
사랑한 모든 날
그 모든 게 다 상처로 남아 버렸죠

마지막 그대 모습이
여전히 늘 꿈속을 헤매이죠

눈물만 남아있는 나의 하루에 그대
한번이라도 찾아와 주길

그저 먼 발치서라도
그 모습이라도
한번만 바라볼 수는 없나요

난 아직 그대를 원망하죠
그토록 절실했던 나를 떠난 사람

계절을 돌고 돌아
사랑한 모든 날
그 모든 게 다 상처로 남아 버렸죠

언젠간 다시 만난다면
그때는
헤어지지는 말아요 그대

나를 떠나버린 그대여
여전히 이 자리에 나는 기다려요

수많을 나의 밤은
그대와의 사랑
추억하며 살아갈 테니까
잊지 마요

Romanization

byeori boineun goseuro oh

Hangeul

새벽 공기 마시면서 집으로 갈때
네가 좋아하는 노래를 틀고 걷곤해
나도 몰래 미소가 번졌어 입가에
You make my day 다 네 덕분에
이럴 줄 몰랐어 너는 알까 내 감정
찌릿찌릿해 감전
저 달도 웃어줬어
이 마음 전하고 싶어서
전화를 걸어 용기가 생겨서
넌 뭐하고 있냐고 그 뒤론 생각 안나서
실실 웃고 삥삥 돌다 집 앞 놀이터로 왔어
물론 보고 싶다는 말도 못했지
너무 가벼워 보이기 싫어서
목소리 평소보다 깔고
‘많이 좋아해’
목 끝까지 찼네
너도 간지럽나봐
날 긁어대기만해
1분 1초가 점점 벅차올라
우리 말곤 뭐가 중요하겠어
몰라, 난 너를 좋아해
보고싶어 미치겠어 막
난 너를 좋아해
이 말 말고는 딱히 모르겠어 난
나랑 만나줄래?
내 마음이 말해
널 좋아해 사랑해 보고싶네
말로는 부족할 것 같아 너에게 갈게 right now

chumchudeusi useo boja
nadapge up all night

Hangeul

Light and dark
이 길 끝에 너와 나
We’ll be fine
내일 해는 떠오르잖아
흔들려도 괜찮아 don’t cry
So please baby don’t hide
Dancing in the moonlight
춤추듯이 웃어 보자
나답게 up all night

밤이 깊어지면 나를 적었네
나름 꽤 진지했고 맘대로 안돼서 울었었네
새벽 택시에 기대 큰 숨을 쉬고 집에 가는 길
빌어먹을 세상 얼마나 더 깨져야 되길래
그래 힘들 테니 내 손 놓지 말아줘
넘어지면 어때 내가 꾸는 꿈이 너무 달아서
체한 거지 잠깐 그래서 아파
쉬어가는 법도 모르고 종일 땍땍거려
가끔 취해 쏟아내지 빽빽하게
머린 왱왱 왜 사람들을 피해 다녀 나
조절이 안돼 어디로 튈 것만 같아
속이 안 풀려 이거 너무 꼬였잖아
술 한 잔을 비우고 다시
가슴 씨게 치고
어차피 내일도 똑같을 거야
날 어떻게 사랑하겠어?
됐어 다 꺼지라고 했어
힘이 없어졌어
희미해져 너도
미안,내가 져서

Light and dark
이 길 끝에 너와 나
We’ll be fine
내일 해는 떠오르잖아
흔들려도 괜찮아 don’t cry
So please baby don’t hide
Dancing in the moonlight
춤추듯이 웃어 보자
나답게 up all night

좋은 추억일수도 나쁜 기억일수도
뭐가 됐든 간에 수도 없이 더 경험할수록
단단해질거야 너
단단해진거야 그거 조금 편히 먹어도돼 결국 웃을거야 별거 아닌듯이 uh
화창 해지기 전 흐린 날씨라고 생각하면돼
거울이 너를 지켜줄거니
멋진 얼굴이 절대 상하지 않게 두기로해
고개들고 어깨펴
내가 볼 땐 멋져 네가 제일 yeah
그대로해 그대로
생각보다 너의 편은 훨씬 많아
이거 하나 기억하자
너한테 제일 솔직해야돼
가끔 뒤도 보고 친구의 어깨가 돼줘
챙겨줬으면 좋겠어 서로
엄마 아빠처럼

Light and dark
이 길 끝에 너와 나
We’ll be fine
내일 해는 떠오르잖아
흔들려도 괜찮아 don’t cry
So please baby don’t hide
Dancing in the moonlight
춤추듯이 웃어 보자
나답게 up all night

isi.lyrics:
Lyric Jinsol - from. Sagittarius

Romanization

I can find myself in you
modeun gamgakdeuri Feelin' like twins
Where the silence meets your mind
Floating satellite, nan neoreul chatneun Astronaut

bameun heureugo
When the sky begins to fill with moving stars
(Far beyond the sky)
ssodajineun byeol
Those orbiting lights, from Sagittarius
(Far beyond the sky, baby)

To hold you close in my heart
Even the void won’t take you
To find a home in my arms
Stay in your gravity too

I feel your tears buseojin nalgae
Too many thoughts heuryeojin siya
Let the light shine, breaking through the night
gateun sumeul swieo Here we are

When you lose it, I’ve got you
When it feels like you’re not enough
I’ll be that someone you can lean on
